purpose: VCF-first interpretation catalog manifest. The repo ships compact, source-attributed interpretation slices and treats raw-read caller stacks as optional escalation for BAM/CRAM inputs or vendor VCFs that omit CNV/SV/repeat calls.

expected_inputs: WGS VCF or VCF.GZ from a sequencing provider
23andMe/Ancestry-style SNP array export or converted VCF
raw_read_callers_required_when: the user provides BAM/CRAM/FASTQ instead of VCF
the vendor VCF does not include needed CNV/SV/repeat records
the pipeline is being externally validated by regenerating query VCFs from GIAB reads

repo_contained_sources.role: compact PRS definitions for disease, wellness, and optimization traits
repo_contained_sources.source_policy: keep trait definitions compact; do not vendor full PGS scoring archives

repo_contained_sources.role: small local CNV/SV/repeat interpretation and normalization catalog
repo_contained_sources.source_policy: clinician-review or readiness annotations only unless validated
consumer wording must remain wellness-first and non-diagnostic

optional_external_sources.name: ClinVar
optional_external_sources.recommended_use: pathogenic, likely pathogenic, risk factor, pharmacogenomic, and benign/conflict filtering
optional_external_sources.repo_policy: download or index locally outside git; compile only matched/reportable rows into compact artifacts

optional_external_sources.name: CPIC API/database
optional_external_sources.repo_policy: vendor only derived drug-gene rules needed by the report

optional_external_sources.name: PGS Catalog
optional_external_sources.recommended_use: polygenic scores for cardiometabolic, sleep, activity, lipid, inflammatory, and aging-adjacent traits
optional_external_sources.repo_policy: keep selected compact scoring definitions; do not vendor bulk FTP archives

optional_external_sources.name: GWAS Catalog
optional_external_sources.recommended_use: source discovery for wellness and optimization associations
optional_external_sources.repo_policy: use as discovery input; promote only replicated, genome-wide significant, consumer-safe entries

optional_external_sources.name: Open Targets Genetics
optional_external_sources.repo_policy: store only compact variant-gene-trait evidence summaries

do_not_claim: every VCF record has a wellness meaning
CNV/SV/repeat findings are complete when only SNP-array or small-variant VCF data is present
single weak SNP associations are personal health recommendations
